name: skills
description: Applied skills: shadcn-tailwind (shadcn 4 + Tailwind v4), the design-* family (design-layout, design-motion, design-polish, design-taste), speed-daemon (optimistic UI), quality-audit (stack-aware repo audit), saltintesta (prose tone), flavored-md (GFM form-matching), zoom-out (strategic project review), changelog (skimmable decision log). Narrow, stack-specific discipline.
